## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod stand-up to discuss updates, new clients, and collaborative tools.](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New clients (Engine, Aimbit, Town) joining the pod, increasing from 4 to 7 active clients](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Discussed standardization needs for Airtable bases and potential automations](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Explored use of Perplexity and Claude AI for creating client-specific knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)

## Topics

### New Team Member Introduction

  - [Feyisayo Odedeyi joined the team, working on Airbytes and Sunbit](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Moving to direct support, will be working on Engine (new client) and Aimbit](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### New Clients Overview

  - [Engine: Travel booking for groups, focused on employers doing off-sites/team trips](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Aimbit: Account access management for non-human entities (APIs, automated processes)](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Town: Tax services for small businesses (SMB)](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Airtable Standardization and Improvements

  - [Discussed need for standardized elements across client bases (e.g., statuses, clusters)](https://fathom.video/share/itsRoNw3sR2CzzzqUxasu5Qb3viEvxrS?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
